sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41988" key="e(ptaou/gkion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑπτα-ούγκιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> Lat. <sense id="n41988.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">septunx,</tr_> ib.</sense> </entryFree>
